Document:
# Big Guns
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Big%20Guns"/]
## Big Guns
Big Guns are heavy weapons that deal devastating damage. They are difficult to carry and expensive to feed, but nothing matches their raw stopping power once a fight turns serious.
[bold]Warning:[/bold] Big Guns are usually restricted to military-grade factions. Carrying one openly is enough to attract attention almost anywhere in the Wasteland.
Miniguns deliver overwhelming volume of fire and are best used for suppression, defense, and faction-level fire superiority.
[bold]Weapon[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] [bold]Minigun[/bold] Standard heavy minigun. High sustained fire rate. [bold]Avenger Minigun[/bold] Enhanced variant. Higher damage and accuracy than standard.
Grenade and missile launchers are area-denial weapons that break fortified positions and punish clustered enemies.
[bold]Weapon[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] [bold]Grenade Launcher[/bold] Launches explosive grenades at medium range. [bold]Missile Launcher[/bold] Fires guided missiles. Maximum area denial. [bold]Grenade Rifle[/bold] Shoulder-fired grenade launcher. More portable than the standard launcher.
LMGs provide sustained automatic fire and excel in prepared positions or coordinated squad fights.
[bold]Weapon[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] [bold]Light Machine Gun (LMG)[/bold] Belt-fed automatic. High sustained fire in defensive positions. [bold]Auto Rifle (LMG variant)[/bold] Lighter LMG profile. More mobile than belt-fed.
The flamer projects burning fuel across a wide area and is especially effective against creatures and lightly armored targets.
[bold]Weapon[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] [bold]Flamer[/bold] Wide area incendiary. Very effective at close range against flesh and lightly armored targets.
